sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 램리서치는 AI 수요 확대에 힘입어 2026년 3월 분기 매출 58억 4,100만 달러와 EPS 1.47달러를 기록하며 실적 성장을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: AI 로드맵을 지원하는 고객사 수요가 증가하며 분기 기준 매출과 EPS 모두 기록적인 성과를 달성했습니다.
전 분기 대비 매출은 9% 증가했으며, 비GAAP 기준 희석 EPS는 1.47달러로 16% 성장했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 현금 및 현금성 자산은 자본 환원 활동, 부채 상환, 설비 투자 등으로 인해 전 분기 62억 달러에서 47억 7,000만 달러로 감소했습니다.
이연 매출은 전 분기 22억 5,000만 달러에서 22억 2,000만 달러로 소폭 감소했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 비GAAP 기준 영업이익률은 35.0%로 전 분기 34.3% 대비 개선되었습니다.
비GAAP 기준 총이익률은 49.9%를 기록하며 전 분기 대비 20bp 상승했습니다.

watchItems.text: AI 관련 수요가 지속적으로 램리서치의 매출 성장을 견인할 수 있을지 향후 분기별 매출 추이를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

hare, for the quarter ended December 28, 2025 (the “December 2025 quarter”). Non-GAAP Financial Results For the March 2026 quarter, non-GAAP gross margin was $2,913 million, or 49.9% of revenue, non-GAAP operating expenses were $866 million, non-GAAP operating margin was 35.0%, and non-GAAP net income was $1,851 million, or $1.47 per diluted share. This compares to non-GAAP gross margin of $2,658 million, or 49.7% of revenue, non-GAAP operating expenses of $827 million, non-GAAP operating margin of 34.3%, and non-GAAP net income of $1,598 million, or $1.27 per diluted share, for the December 2025 quarter. “Lam delivered record revenue and EPS in the March quarter as AI-driven de  Normalized numeric aliases: $2,913 million = 29억 1,300만 달러; $866 million = 8억 6,600만 달러; $1,851 million = 18억 5,100만 달러; $2,658 million = 26억 5,800만 달러; $827 million = 8억 2,700만 달러; $1,598 million = 15억 9,800만 달러; $2,913 = 2,913달러; $866 = 866달러; $1,851 = 1,851달러; $1.47 = 1.47달러; $2,658 = 2,658달러; $827 = 827달러.

ng customers' AI roadmaps and driving Lam's outperformance during this critical phase of industry growth.” Balance Sheet and Cash Flow Results Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash balances decreased to $4.77 billion at the end of the March 2026 quarter compared to $6.20 billion at the end of the December 2025 quarter. The decrease was primarily the result of cash deployed for capital return activities, principal payment on debt instruments, and capital expenditures, partially offset by cash generated from operating activities during the quarter. Deferred revenue at the end of the March 2026 quarter decreased slightly to $2.22 billion compared to $2.25 billion as of the end of the December 2025 quarter. Lam's deferred revenue balance does not include shipments to customers   Normalized numeric aliases: $4.77 billion = 47억 7,000만 달러; $6.20 billion = 62억 달러; $2.22 billion = 22억 2,000만 달러; $2.25 billion = 22억 5,000만 달러; $4.77 = 4.77달러; $6.20 = 6.20달러; $2.22 = 2.22달러; $2.25 = 2.25달러.
